title: How Do You Promote Your Aesthetics Business？ | Dr Tim's Tips
filename: How Do You Promote Your Aesthetics Business？ ｜ Dr Tim_s Tips.en.vtt
excerpt: So the question how do you promote your aesthetic business comes up a lot when people are first starting and it really started what is the strategy for your business [Music] who are you trying to treat and people don't often ask themselves this but i always recommend you start ou…

segments.text: so the question how do you promote your aesthetic business comes up a lot when people are first starting and it really started what is the strategy for your business [Music] who are you trying to treat and people don't often ask themselves this but i always recommend you start out by deciding who do you want your clients to be do you want them to be cautious middle-aged women who will take a long time to make a decision but when they're happy they will be loyal those are my type of clients or do you want someone who's kind of easier to talk to maybe they're closer to your age they could be older or younger depending what you are and you might want to go after them for particular reasons maybe because you understand what makes them tick um maybe because you feel more comfortable treating that kind of person but decide who you want to treat that's the first question before you decide how to promote your business you need to decide where you're going to promote your business and where you want to promote your business depends on where the people you want to treat hang out so start out by doing that and then start creating

start creating communication that gets their attention now that could be as simple as a friend referral scheme where you're giving messages to people you've treated um if you've presumably got a couple through your social network about what you stand for and what you can do for people and say if you will refer clients to me um then i will you can often give them a discount we certainly did that for years and we give them a discount for referring a friend that's one way to promote your business you might also start using hashtags on instagram that make sure that people who search for those kind of things are your kind of clients so you might want to put the hashtag of where your business is located because people might search for your business in that area or people who offer your types of services so once again it's the same principle you're effectively targeting people who are your kind of clients by getting to know the kind of behaviors that they engage with and where they will hang out and how to communicate with them on their level salons is another way you can do it facebook ads instagram ads they're all essentially

targeting your communication at people who might be interested in your treatment and then of course finally you've got to make them an offer at some point now the offer doesn't mean you know 99 pound for lip filler it could be a full 30 minute consultation to discuss all of your needs before we decide to do anything you've got to make it clear what it is you can offer and it really helps if they know where you are so i always include that in the processes is where are you what is your offer um how do they actually act to get that offer um and those are the foundation principles of how to promote your business to people um there's a whole other layer of how to build trust and that comes across in your marketing as well so it isn't just about holding your hands up and saying i do botox and dermal filler although that's what a lot of people do they get very little response because people want someone they can trust so there's a whole host of material you can produce um on in the same format or through the same communication channels as you've already opened that is around trust building so that they know they've found someone who's competent and

accessible friendly to talk to and trustworthy in terms of got their interests at heart if you can tick those three boxes of trust and you'll find that people will book in and as long as they know about you so you've got to put the message out a lot so putting a message out once is one of the things the bug bears i always have is when people say i've tried everything and nothing works um trying everything is not the same thing as consistently trying everything day in day out for weeks because those people absolutely get somewhere i've been in this game a long time i've trained many people i see some of them just step out and rock it because they consistently communicate to their clients they know who their clients are doesn't appeal to everyone they talk to them every single day on whatever channels they are using often it's social media and they make them offers and they lo and behold will book in and that's how you build an assassin's business it's not rocket science the hardest thing is just consistently training yourself to implement every single day on whatever channel you'd like to promote yourself on hope that helps
